items.title: Prompting Patterns for Anthropic Claude
items.description: What works specifically with Claude Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, and Haiku 4.5 — XML tags, long context, constraint following, extended thinking, and tiered instructions.

items.title: Prompting Patterns for Google Gemini
items.description: What works specifically with Gemini 3.1 Pro and Gemini 3 Flash — multimodal prompts, web grounding, Google Workspace integration, multilingual output, and code execution.

items.title: Prompting Patterns for Open Source Models
items.description: What works with self-hosted and API-accessed open models — Llama 4, DeepSeek R1, Qwen 3/3.5, Hermes 4, and others. Covers system prompt formats, quantization-aware prompting, reasoning toggles, and temperature tuning.

items.title: Prompting Patterns for OpenAI GPT-5.4
items.description: What works specifically with GPT-5.4 and ChatGPT — system prompts, structured output, verbosity control, Thinking mode, and multi-turn strategies.

items.title: Prompting Patterns for xAI Grok
items.description: What works specifically with Grok 4.1 and Grok 4.20 — factual accuracy, instruction following, real-time X/Twitter data, and multi-agent mode.
